\tzpentry{ID3435}{Susceptibility Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3435 introduces Susceptibility Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ B(\chi) = \frac{\Delta\phi(\chi)}{\phi_c} = \frac{33.34^\circ}{30^\circ} = \frac{10}{9} &gt; 1 $$
